scripts.lint: biome lint astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json src/i18n src/lib
scripts.format: biome format --write astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json src/i18n src/lib
scripts.check: biome check astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json src/i18n src/lib
scripts.validate: bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run audit
